message:
refactor(phase3b): add kc-agent drift-detect + kubectl sync handlers (#8036)

Adds the kc-agent side of the GitOps drift/sync migration (#7993
Phase 3b). New handlers shell `kubectl diff` and `kubectl apply` under
the user's kubeconfig instead of running under the backend pod
ServiceAccount.

New file pkg/agent/server_gitops.go:
- handleDetectDrift (POST /gitops/detect-drift)
- handleGitopsSync (POST /gitops/sync)

Each handler:
- Mirrors the backend DetectDriftRequest / DetectDriftResponse /
  SyncRequest / SyncResponse body shapes exactly so the Phase 4
  frontend migration is a pure URL swap.
- Re-implements the backend's validators and helpers (validateRepoURL,
  validateBranchName, cloneRepo, isKustomizeDir, cleanupTempDir,
  parseDiffOutput, parseApplyOutput) inside pkg/agent since the agent
  cannot import pkg/api/handlers.
- Uses the same gitopsDefaultTimeout (30s) and gitOpsTempDirPrefix the
  backend uses.
- Only implements the kubectl path. The backend handler has an
  MCP-first path that falls back to kubectl when the bridge fails
  (h.bridge nil or erroring). kc-agent does not carry the MCP bridge,
  so it always takes the fallback kubectl path. Source is hardcoded to
  "kubectl" on responses.

Routes registered in pkg/agent/server.go:
- /gitops/detect-drift, /gitops/sync

This PR adds the agent side only. The backend handlers in
pkg/api/handlers/gitops.go DetectDrift and Sync remain in place until
Phase 4 deletes them along with the frontend URL swap.

Refs #7993

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -418,6 +418,13 @@ func (s *Server) Start() error {
 	mux.HandleFunc("/helm/uninstall", s.handleHelmUninstall)
 	mux.HandleFunc("/helm/upgrade", s.handleHelmUpgrade)
 
+	// GitOps drift detection + kubectl sync moved to kc-agent (#7993 Phase 3b).
+	// These shell `kubectl diff` / `kubectl apply` under the user's kubeconfig.
+	// Backend handlers are still present until Phase 4 deletes them — routes
+	// in pkg/agent/server_gitops.go.
+	mux.HandleFunc("/gitops/detect-drift", s.handleDetectDrift)
+	mux.HandleFunc("/gitops/sync", s.handleGitopsSync)
+
 	// Rename context endpoint
 	mux.HandleFunc("/rename-context", s.handleRenameContextHTTP)
